attribution: Frequency list derived from OpenSubtitles 2018 by Hermit Dave (hermitdave/FrequencyWords, MIT License). Used in WordBrain as a SUBTLEX-US substitute: both lists are subtitle-corpus derived and rank English lemmas by subtitle frequency (Brysbaert & New, 2009 — SUBTLEX-US is CC-BY-NC-SA, so we intentionally ship the MIT hermitdave list instead).
description: Top-ranked English words from OpenSubtitles 2018 subtitle corpus. Filtered to lowercase a-z words of 1-24 chars (single-letter only for 'a' and 'i'). Each entry is [lemma, rank, raw_count].
